title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: - **Medium:** Dispatch semantics are internally inconsistent for production verification. [`vote.md:30`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md:30) requires continuing through `dispatch or rerun`, but [`vote.md:79`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md:79) + [`vote.md:81`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md:81) frame `/vote` as local/non-handoff with only “backup-only” dispatch allowed, while [`README.md:95`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md:95) treats `workflow_dispatch or rerun` as the normal proof path. - **Medium:** “Production PASS proof” is required but underspecified, so completion can still be interpreted loosely. [`vote.md:40`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md:40) asks for PASS fields, but no mandatory evidence schema (e.g., run id, head SHA, artifact identifiers, exact verdict fields) is enforced; static checks only verify phrase presence in [`scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:115`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:115) and related assertions. - **Low (operational):** Policy audit scripts are brittle in constrained environments due temp-file assumptions, causing false-negative audit failures before full verification completes. `mktemp` usage in [`scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:170`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:170) and [`scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:267`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:267) failed in this session’s sandbox, interrupting full local contract validation.
